newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. LumenRadio's last report was Q1 2026 (April 23); the company reiterated its long-term goal to double revenue to SEK500M by 2030. A ~$80M micro-cap with no fresh catalysts; the small price drift is illiquidity, not news.

verdicts.rankRationale: Test-time-scaling/compute-factory networking lens: tiny $80M industrial-wireless/edge-control name. No news since June 9; Q1 was April. Watchlist fit unchanged. Long-tail hold, no basis to re-rank.
verdicts.bull: Niche industrial wireless connectivity for edge control.
verdicts.neutral: Micro-cap optionality, illiquid, only loosely AI-scaling adjacent.
verdicts.bear: Tiny, illiquid, peripheral to the compute-scaling thesis.
